text: Being here, I feel a mixture of curiosity and anticipation. The sterile quietness of the hallway—reflecting a kind of museum or gallery atmosphere—encourages introspection. The bright, inviting colors and bold lettering of 'R+D' beyond the glass hint at innovation and discovery, drawing me forward. I feel a sense of possibility, as if I am on the threshold of learning something new about how humans interact with technology and each other. Yet, there is also a subtle distance—glass divides me from the vibrant energy within, prompting reflection on the ways in which knowledge and experience are often just out of reach, inviting pursuit.
